introSection: Piraten Spinner is a steel spinning roller coaster located at Freizeit-Land Geiselwind in Geiselwind, Bavaria, Germany. It opened in 1994 and was manufactured by Zierer.

sections.title: History
sections.content: When the ride first opened in 1994, it was known as Drehgondelbahn, which was German for Revolving Gondola Track. It was renamed Piraten Spinner for the 2019 season.

fullText:
Piraten Spinner is a steel spinning roller coaster located at Freizeit-Land Geiselwind in Geiselwind, Bavaria, Germany. It opened in 1994 and was manufactured by Zierer.

When the ride first opened in 1994, it was known as Drehgondelbahn, which was German for Revolving Gondola Track. It was renamed Piraten Spinner for the 2019 season.



Red track and green supports.
